name: Rahul Sharma
content: Ashirwad Stationery is my go-to place for all assignment printouts and project binding. They are super fast and always friendly!

name: Priya Patel
content: I regularly get my exam papers and charts printed here. The quality is consistently excellent and the pricing is very reasonable.

name: Amit Kumar
content: Reliable service for bulk photocopying and office supplies. Their new color printing setup is top-notch.
